empty.calm: Your path hasn't placed a marker yet. Show up when you can — the journey is long, and there's no rush.

first_session.name: First Session
first_session.rule: Granted after completing one full session.

first_week.name: First Week
first_week.rule: Granted when at least one session is completed within an ISO week.

three_weeks_present.name: Three Weeks Present
three_weeks_present.rule: Granted after completing at least one session in three consecutive ISO weeks.

eight_week_rhythm.name: Eight-Week Rhythm
eight_week_rhythm.rule: Granted after completing at least one session in eight consecutive ISO weeks.

return_after_break.name: Return After a Break
return_after_break.rule: Granted when you complete a session at least 14 days after the previous one.

first_mesocycle_complete.name: First Mesocycle Complete
first_mesocycle_complete.rule: Granted when every non-skipped session of a mesocycle is completed.

first_deload_honored.name: First Deload Honored
first_deload_honored.rule: Granted after completing a session marked as part of a deload week.

rpe_awareness.name: RPE Awareness
rpe_awareness.rule: Granted after five sessions in which every set carries an RPE value.
